title: Brainrot
description: Overflowing with memes! My brain stopped braining
body:
# Brainrot

Brainrot is a chaotic, meme-fueled modpack that throws logic out the window and embraces the absurd. It’s built for players who want a Minecraft experience that’s equal parts unhinged humor, bizarre creatures, and braincell-destroying visuals and sounds. From Skibidi Toilet invasions to Among Us sand, spinning paintings, and Jack Black-voiced villagers, every part of the world has been touched by chaos.

This pack combines goofy resourcepacks, cursed mobs, viral sound replacements, and custom content that turns the game into an internet fever dream. Whether you're battling toilets, trading with Herobrine, or jamming to meme discs, Brainrot is meant to be funny, dumb, and unforgettable.

**Perfect for** multiplayer chaos, meme-loving players, or anyone who wants a break from serious gameplay and just wants to vibe in the weirdest Minecraft world imaginable.


```
Warning: May cause actual brainrot.
```
